# Dalec v0.29.0

## Release notes

Validates two hardening changes: the signed Git tag annotation now embeds the
full signature-verification instructions (shared with the release body), and the
worker QEMU/binfmt setup is pinned by digest and retried so transient Docker Hub
timeouts no longer fail the release.
